//: runtimeVersion is the fixed OTA-cohort string. Bumped 2.0.0 -> '2.1.0' on 2026-07-13 for the new-logo + design-system build: a DELIBERATE fresh cohort so (a) EAS updates published from now on target ONLY 2.1.0 binaries, isolated from the live 2.0.0, and (b) once the new build is live on BOTH stores we raise the backend min-version to '2.1.0' to force-update every 2.0.0 user (gate in src/config/forceUpdate.ts compares Updates.runtimeVersion against /api/mobile/app-config). Marketing 'version' climbs with it. RULE: bump runtimeVersion for a fresh cohort (native change OR a forced-update cutover) and rebuild iOS AND Android together.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Reglo usa la fotocamera per acquisire foto e documenti utili alla gestione delle pratiche in autoscuola.
